Item 1A. Risk Factors

The following risk factor updates supplement the risk factors disclosed in our most recent annual report on Form 10-K filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

Export control regulations and license requirements imposed by the United States on semiconductor products with advanced computing capability may significantly limit our addressable market in affected geographies.

Our reliance on a concentrated group of hyperscale cloud customers for a substantial portion of Data Center revenue creates customer concentration risk that could materially impact results if demand patterns shift.

New domestic content requirements embedded in legislation governing government procurement and incentive programs could affect the eligibility of our products and constrain certain customer purchasing decisions.

Item 3. Other Information
